completed_since_last_snapshot: ENTIRE PHASE P2 COMPLETED AND VERIFIED this session (docs/verification/P2.md). All six slices S2.1-S2.6 ran through the full nine-stage SDLC loop; per-slice run archives in meta/runs/S2.*.json. Suite grew 60 -> 118 tests, all green.

S2.1: src/components/{EntityId,Transform,Collider,Behavior,Entity}.ts — logic-free pure-data records (branded EntityId + rt: runtime namespace const, TransformDef, AabbDef, 12-kind closed BehaviorDef union + ENTITY_KINDS, EntityDef with behavior.kind as the single discriminant — no redundant kind field). Machine-enforced decoupling: ComponentsLogicFree.test.ts scans src/components/ source (comments/strings stripped) and fails on function/=>/class.

S2.2: schema types (Tilemap 0=empty/1=solid closed ids; TriggerDef standalone wiring + TRIGGER_ACTION_TARGET_KIND table; GdosMetadata 4 provisional axes + emotional keyframes + minimal creatorMomentFrame; LevelDefinition root with levelId/title, LEVEL_SCHEMA_VERSION=1) + src/schema/Serialize.ts canonical serializer (fixed key order, 2-space, -0 normalized) + docs/level_schema.md (NORMATIVE: y-down/top-left/gravity+y coordinate convention, versioning policy, canonical form, axiom boundary, full field reference). dm-0015 records the five S2.2 shape decisions.

S2.3: src/schema/Parse.ts — parseLevel/parseLevelText, the ONLY construction path (parse-don't-validate, mints EntityId/TriggerId brands). Never throws; collects ALL errors with JSON-pointer paths; strict unknown-key rejection; finite-only numbers, -0 normalized; schemaVersion hard-reject; id uniqueness + rt: guard; trigger referential integrity + kind-compatibility. 27 rejection/accept tests + 300-mutant seeded fuzz (createRng(20260709)).

S2.4: test/fixtures/fixture-all-kinds.level.json (4-space authored formatting, value-twin of test/helpers/Samples.makeSampleLevel) + LevelRoundTrip.test.ts: value round-trip, byte idempotence, GOLDEN CANONICAL SHA256 c0ec3b1f89033e73b2f6d5819090c2cfcaf18a342b2c4dbf4cf5baa2ada8174e (re-anchoring = ledgered decision only), programmatic closed-list coverage, authored!=canonical pinned.

S2.5: src/entities/World.ts — WorldState {level frozen+reference-shared (dm-0009), entities runtime records, playerPosition/Velocity, nextSpawnSerial} + instantiateWorld (pure, freezes def idempotently) + createInitialState. LevelInstantiation.test.ts proves REQ-120/121 completion: (fixture FILE, seed, input tape) -> bit-identical replay across independent runs under freezeOnCommit, world.level === def after 240 ticks, movement scalar read from level data.

S2.6: docs/verification/P2.md filed. Per dm-0008: REQ-120, REQ-121, REQ-122 -> VERIFIED; REQ-014 (P2,P10) and REQ-154 (P3) correctly stay IN_PROGRESS. Rollup: 52/9/0/6. IRD current-status rewritten (P2 VERIFIED, P3 active); execution_plan.md P2 section CLOSED with C2.1-C2.6 all checked; task_slices pick-list -> S3.x.
